name: Pork Scallops with Lemon and Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Instead of using white wine, you can use vermouth or chicken stock.
2. Dredge the pork scallops in flour seasoned with salt and pepper.
3. Shake off excess. In a large heavy frypan, heat oil over medium-high heat and cook the pork scallops in batches until browned on both sides. Remove to a plate and keep warm.
4. Add wine, vermouth or chicken stock to frypan and cook over high heat, scraping up the brown bits from the bottom, until reduced by about half.
5. Add lemon juice, grated lemon rind, parsley, basil, thyme, and oregano. Return pork scallops to frypan, turning occasionally, until well coated in the sauce and heated through.
6. Serve with noodles and a green steamed vegetable. Serves 4.
